public_surface_summary.history_period: 2003-12-17 to 2026-01-20 on methodology page; guide references 2003-12-17 to 2025-12-05

notes: VantMacro is a useful macro-context provenance candidate, but its public taxonomy is seven macro composite states rather than the active Board A MainRegimeV2 price roots.
CrisisLiquidation can inform Crisis provenance only; it does not provide exact Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis source labels for the current yfinance/Kraken provider-instrument-timeframe missing slots.
The public surface documents methodology and aggregate distributions, but no row-level historical label export was located on the public surface in this audit.
The methodology itself describes classifications as model outputs and context/risk framing, so a local reimplementation would be a derived model/proxy rather than an independent source-label panel.
